creator: felixp@gmail.com
text:
The  suhosin-patch-5.3.7-0.9.10.patch.gz  does not seem to exist anywhere... cannot be fetched nor installed which leads to an dependency failure of the lang/php5 build

Upgrading 'php5-5.3.6_1' to 'php5-5.3.7' (lang/php5)

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/lang/php5 && make all install clean
